abilities.effect: You toss the ball of twine into a square within 20 feet. The twine then unravels and animates, attempting to Disarm or Trip (your choice) a creature in the square with a total of +9 to the Athletics check. At the end of your turn, the twine winds itself back into a ball and returns to your hand; if you don't have a free hand, it returns to your space instead.
abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

stat_block.text: This ball of hempen twine resists efforts to unravel it by hand.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.name: Twisting Twine (Moderate)
variants.text: You can activate the moderate twisting twine once per hour instead of once per day, and the Athletics modifier is +12.

variants.name: Twisting Twine (Greater)
variants.text: You can activate the greater twisting twine without any frequency limit, and the Athletics modifier is +15.
